title: Sciodaphyllum albocapitatum
taxonomy: Sciodaphyllum albocapitatum is a species of plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the ginseng or ivy family. The Araliaceae family is a group of flowering plants that includes approximately 1,300 species. The classification of Sciodaphyllum albocapitatum is further divided into the genera Sciodaphyllum and the subfamily Aralioideae. The exact classification of Sciodaphyllum albocitatum is still being studied by botanists, but it is known to be part of the order Apiales.
constituents: Sciodaphyllum albocapitatum is a species of plant, but information about its active constituents is limited. The plant is often used in traditional medicine. However, there is limited scientific research on its chemical composition. Further studies are required to identify its active constituents and potential medicinal properties.
